def positive_init_file_re_exports_private_module_symbols():
    rule_id = "init_file_re_exports_private_module_symbols"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "__init__.py re-exports a symbol with a leading underscore, leaking private implementation details."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
